name: Bao Hoang
title: Full-Stack Cloud Software Consultant / Senior .NET Consultant
summary: A resourceful Full-Stack Cloud Software Consultant with over a decade of international experience across financial services, hospitality, telecommunications, gambling, and EV sectors. Specializing in C#, .NET, Azure, AWS, DevOps, and Solution Architecture. Experienced in building cloud-first solutions, event-driven systems, and Gen AI integrations. Proven ability to lead teams, deliver high-quality software quickly, and manage full SDLC in dynamic environments.
certifications: Microsoft Certified: Developing Solutions for Microsoft Azure (AZ-204)

projects.name: Tombola Replatforming Project (.NET 8 Migration)
projects.description: Migrating Tombola’s platform from .NET Framework 4.8 to .NET 8 using the Strangler Fig Pattern, consolidating four codebases into a unified White Label product while supporting the Player Protection Risk Framework and Safeplay systems.
responsibilities: Led event-driven Risk Framework for Player Protection Scores (UK).
Delivered OpenBanking integration for player financial verification.
Built internal compliance tools and migrated multi-tenant exclusion logic.
Handled full SDLC, troubleshooting, AWS management, and technical decisions.

projects.name: Customized IAM Solution Migration to Azure AD B2C
projects.description: Migrated an in-house IAM solution used by ASP.NET MVC and Xamarin apps to Azure AD B2C, introducing MFA, OAuth2, and secure API integrations.
responsibilities: Gathered system requirements and designed migration strategy.
Set up Azure AD B2C tenant, custom policies, and user claims migration.
Integrated MVC and mobile apps using OpenIdConnect and MSAL.
Secured backend APIs with Azure AD B2C.

projects.name: Greenfield Electric Vehicle Solution (BP)
projects.description: Developed and launched EV management platforms for fleet managers in Europe using microservices and event-driven architectures across Azure and AWS.
responsibilities: Wrote initial architecture and established coding standards.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines with Azure DevOps and Terraform.
Built microservices and APIs for EV domain using .NET Core and Azure services.
Led PoCs on AWS GraphQL (AppSync, Apollo), monitoring, and observability setup.

projects.name: Akara Platform
projects.description: Built a cloud-native platform for event organizers to showcase events and attendee reviews.

projects.name: CPA Global Platform (Baoh Consulting Ltd)
projects.description: Developed a cloud-first patent management platform for CPA Global, streamlining CI/CD pipelines and cloud infrastructure.
responsibilities: Created document processing microservices with Azure Functions.
Led front-end PoC to production using Angular 8 and Ngrx.
Automated deployments reducing downtime from 2 hours to zero.

projects.name: Hospitality SaaS Platform (iRis Software Systems)
projects.description: Enhanced global SaaS guest experience platform with new backend architecture and single-page reporting features.

projects.name: Truphone Number Porting System
projects.description: Developed ASP.NET MVC application for number transfer across telecom networks.

projects.name: Collector Bank Invoicing System
projects.description: Maintained complex invoicing and credit systems integrating with Visa, MasterCard, and Experian.
